attributes.mlflow.spanOutputs:
{"result": "|    | PRODUCT    | PLATFORM   | STAGE_NAMES       | total_failures   |
|---:|:-----------|:-----------|:------------------|:-----------------|
|  0 | RTL        | iOS        | PDP PAGE VIEW     | 1.045425E8       |
|  1 | RTL        | Android    | PDP PAGE VIEW     | 8.48175E7        |
|  2 | SALPL      | iOS        | PDP PAGE VIEW     | 6.936625E7       |
|  3 | SALPL      | Android    | PDP PAGE VIEW     | 6.50925E7        |
|  4 | PLCS       | iOS        | PDP PAGE VIEW     | 5.687375E7       |
|  5 | PLCS       | Android    | PDP PAGE VIEW     | 4.240875E7       |
|  6 | ONBOARDING | iOS        | OTP SUBMIT signup | 4.1709907E7      |
|  7 | ONBOARDING | Android    | OTP SUBMIT signup | 4.1454018E7      |
|  8 | PL         | Android    | PDP PAGE VIEW     | 2.925875E7       |
|  9 | PL         | iOS        | PDP PAGE VIEW     | 2.7615E7         |", "query": "SELECT
  d.PRODUCT,
  f.PLATFORM,
  d.STAGE_NAMES,
  SUM(ks.Failure_Count) AS total_failures
FROM
  `bfl_std_lake`.`digital360_preprod`.dim_event_pl d
  JOIN `bfl_std_lake`.`digital360_preprod`.dim_event_kpi_pl dek ON d.EVENT_ID = dek.EVENT_ID
  JOIN `bfl_std_lake`.`digital360_preprod`.fact_kpi_summary_pl ks ON dek.KPI_ID = ks.KPI_ID
  JOIN `bfl_std_lake`.`digital360_preprod`.fact_event_summary_daily_pl f ON d.EVENT_ID = f.EVENT_ID
WHERE
  ks.Date BETWEEN '2025-12-08' AND '2025-12-14'
  AND d.PRODUCT IS NOT NULL
  AND d.STAGE_NAMES IS NOT NULL
  AND f.PLATFORM IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
  d.PRODUCT,
  f.PLATFORM,
  d.STAGE_NAMES
ORDER BY
  total_failures DESC
LIMIT 10;", "description": "You want to see the top 10 combinations of product, platform, and journey stage that have the highest total KPI failure counts for the period from December 8 to December 14, 2025.", "conversation_id": "01f116028d1c13a0910d9d7df63d1543", "suggested_questions": ["What are the top product-platform combinations with the highest KPI failure counts from February 23, 2026 to March 2, 2026?", "What are the KPI failure counts by product and platform for the week of February 23, 2026 to March 2, 2026?", "What are the top KPI failure counts by stage for each product and platform from February 23, 2026 to March 2, 2026?"], "text_attachment_content": "Would you like to see the top 10 product-platform-stage combinations by KPI failure rates instead of failure counts?"}
